name: Taco Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 4 oz can mild chopped green chilies
recipeInstructions:
Serves 6 to 8.
In a skillet, brown ground beef and onion; drain fat. Add the water, taco seasoning and tomato sauce; mix. Simmer for 20 minutes. Transfer to Crock-Pot. Stir in macaroni and chopped green chilies. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours. In the last 30 minutes of cooking, top with shredded Cheddar cheese.
